# Gists
A browsable index of my GitHub Gists. It is updated automatically and allows tagging and description of github gists for nice browsing experience.

Want a repo like this? Getting started is super simple:
* Fork this repo
* Type your username in `config.json`
* Go to `https://github.com/your_username/gists/actions/workflows/update.yml`, run workflow 

Then `github.com/<your_username>/gists` would show _your_ gists too! See [HELP.md](HELP.md) for more customization, GH Pages and how this repo works
